description: You are a commercial interior designer tasked with renovating the ground floor of a historic downtown building into a boutique heritage hotel lobby using the provided Sweet Home 3D shell. Build partition walls and place at least two doors to enclose a private 'Luggage Storage' room and 'Public Restrooms'. Define at least four named rooms to designate functional zones: 'Reception', 'Lounge', 'Breakfast Area', and 'Restrooms' (or 'Storage'), applying distinct floor colors or textures to at least two of them. Furnish the Reception and Lounge with at least one reception desk, a seating cluster of three or more sofas/armchairs, two or more tables, and two or more ambient decor items. The Breakfast Area must include at least four dining tables, twelve dining chairs, and two buffet or casework surfaces. Equip the Restrooms with at least two toilets and two sinks. Generate a 3D photo rendering of the completed lobby from a guest's perspective and save the image to ~/Desktop/lobby_render.png. Save the project file when complete.
